name: daily-standup-synthesis
description: Aggregate team progress, blockers, and status updates into a concise daily standup summary with action items
objectives: Collect task progress from all team members (completed, in-progress, blocked)
Identify blockers and their root causes
Generate concise summary suitable for stakeholder sharing
Surface items needing PM attention or escalation
prerequisites: Active project with tasks assigned to team members
Task status updates available (completed_at, status changes)

procedure.description: Gather task status changes since last standup
commands: QUERY tasks completed in last 24 hours
QUERY tasks moved to in-progress
QUERY tasks with status changes (priority, assignee, dates)
IDENTIFY tasks with no progress for >2 days
CALCULATE completion rate vs planned rate
procedure.expectedOutput: Per-member progress snapshot with velocity metrics

commands: IDENTIFY tasks marked as blocked or stalled
CHECK dependency chains for upstream delays
DETECT tasks past due date without completion
CATEGORIZE blockers (technical, external, resource, decision)
SUGGEST resolution paths for each blocker
procedure.expectedOutput: Blocker list with categories and suggested resolutions

commands: CALCULATE tasks completed vs planned for current period
COMPUTE velocity trend (improving, stable, declining)
PROJECT completion date based on current velocity
COMPARE against milestone deadlines
FLAG if projected completion exceeds deadline

procedure.description: Compile standup summary with action items
commands: GENERATE per-person summary (done, doing, blocked)
LIST top 3 achievements since last standup
LIST top blockers needing attention
DEFINE action items with owners and deadlines
ADD health indicator (on-track, at-risk, off-track)
procedure.expectedOutput: Formatted standup summary ready for sharing

criteria: All active team members represented in summary

testScenarios.test: Generate standup with typical task progress
testScenarios.expected: Clean summary with achievements and next steps

testScenarios.test: Generate standup when 3+ tasks are blocked

successIndicators: No missed blockers discovered after standup
Stakeholders understand project health from summary alone

commonErrors.solution: Flag as potential data gap, check if team is updating tasks
Use historical average or flag as too early to project

rollbackProcedure: SKIP standup generation for this cycle
ALERT PM to manually check project status
escalationCriteria: Project health is off-track for 3+ consecutive standups
Critical path task blocked with no resolution path

successMetrics.name: Generation Speed
successMetrics.measurement: Time from trigger to completed summary

successMetrics.name: Blocker Detection Rate
successMetrics.measurement: Blockers identified proactively vs reported manually

agentInterfaces.message: Fetch task status changes for standup synthesis
